paths.name: User: Draft edit → upload → submit success → logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋 User 登入後進入文件列表，開啟 Draft 詳情並完成編輯、上傳附件、送審成功後回列表登出。

paths.name: Admin: Manage templates (save+deactivate) + flow load retry → logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋 Admin 進入流程模板頁、進行模板保存與停用、以及模板列表載入失敗後重試，最後回到文件列表並登出。

paths.name: Reviewer: Reject with retry → success → back → logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋 Reviewer 退回流程含送出失敗後重試，最終退回成功並返回待辦登出。

paths.name: Admin: Create doc success → archive approved success → logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋 Admin 在空文件列表建立文件成功、查看詳情、再開啟 Approved 文件並封存成功，最後登出。

paths.name: User: Empty→create success→submit validation failed → docs load failed→retry→ready → logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋空列表建立成功後送審驗證失敗，返回列表後再覆蓋列表載入失敗/重試回到 Ready，最後登出。

paths.name: User: reopen rejected failed→return→logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋 User Rejected 文件重開 Draft 失敗(reopenFailed)與失敗後返回詳情(returnToDocument from Failed)，並從 Rejected 詳情登出。

paths.name: Reviewer: approve failed→return→back to reviews→logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋 Reviewer 同意審核失敗(approveFailed)分支，回到文件詳情後返回待辦並登出。

paths.name: Admin: create from ready failed→return to admin docs→logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋 Admin 從文件列表 Ready 進入建立文件(clickCreateDocument from Ready)，建立失敗後返回 Admin 列表(returnToAdminDocuments)並登出。

paths.name: Admin: detail load failed→retry→readonly→go flows→logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋 Admin 文件詳情載入失敗/重試，並由 Readonly 詳情前往流程模板頁(goToFlowTemplates)後登出。

paths.name: Reviewer: Reviews load failed → retry → logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋 Reviewer 待辦載入失敗/重試機制，成功載入後登出。

paths.name: User: Detail load failed→retry → submit validation failed → logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋文件詳情載入失敗/重試後，進入 DraftReady 並送審驗證失敗，最後從詳情頁登出。

paths.name: Reviewer: detail load failed→retry→logout from pending action
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋 Reviewer 文件詳情載入失敗與重試，重試成功回到 PendingAction 後直接登出。

paths.name: Admin: Archive failed → back → logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋 Admin 封存請求失敗後返回 Approved 詳情仍可正確回到列表並登出。

paths.name: Auth: Login failed → back to /login
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋登入認證失敗分支，確認不建立 session 並返回可再次輸入的 /login。

paths.name: Admin: Documents load failed → retry → logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋 Admin 文件列表載入失敗與重試機制，成功載入後登出。

paths.name: Admin: Detail NotFound → back → go flows → logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋 Admin 從列表開啟不存在的文件詳情(NotFound)返回後，切換到流程模板頁再登出。

paths.name: Reviewer: detail not found→return to reviews→logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋 Reviewer 開啟文件詳情時 NotFound 分支，並由 NotFound 返回 /reviews 後登出。

paths.name: User: Open document NotFound → return → logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋 User 從列表進入詳情但文件不存在/不可存取時顯示 NotFound，返回列表後登出。

paths.name: User: Rejected→reopen success→submit validation failed → logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋 Rejected 文件先重開 Draft 成功，再送審命中驗證失敗分支，最後從 Draft 詳情登出。

paths.name: Reviewer: Approve (more steps) → back to reviews → logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋 Reviewer 待辦載入、開啟指派文件、同意審核且流程仍需後續步驟的回傳路徑，最後返回待辦並登出。

paths.name: Reviewer: Approve final → doc approved → logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋 Reviewer 同意審核達到最終核准，文件變更為 Approved，返回待辦後登出。

paths.name: User: Upload attachment failed → return → logout from detail
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋 Draft 附件上傳失敗分支，回到詳情後可登出且不殘留失敗附件。

paths.name: User: edit draft save failed→retry→success→logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋 Draft 編輯保存失敗與 retryEdit 分支，最終保存成功並回到詳情登出。

paths.name: User: Ready list → create success → submit validation failed → back to empty → logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋從 Ready 列表建立文件成功後送審驗證失敗，返回列表並走到 Empty 狀態後登出。

paths.name: Admin: documents empty→go flows→flows empty→logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋 Admin 從空文件列表前往流程模板(goToFlowTemplates from Empty)以及從空模板頁登出(clickLogout from Empty)。

paths.name: Admin: approved detail→go flows→flows empty→go docs→logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋 Admin 從 ApprovedReady 詳情切到流程模板(goToFlowTemplates)以及從空模板頁返回文件(goToDocuments from Empty)，最後登出。

paths.name: Admin: manage flow template save failed
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋 Admin 模板管理儲存失敗(saveTemplateFailed)分支，確認失敗時流程停留在可修正狀態。

paths.name: User: rejected→back to documents→reopen rejected logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋 User Rejected 詳情的返回列表(backToDocuments)與從 Rejected 詳情直接登出(clickLogout)兩條未覆蓋連結。

paths.name: Reviewer: readonly detail→logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋 Reviewer 在無待辦的文件詳情(Readonly)直接登出(clickLogout from Readonly)的未覆蓋連結。

paths.name: Admin: approved detail→logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋 Admin 在 ApprovedReady 詳情頁直接登出(clickLogout from ApprovedReady)的未覆蓋連結。

paths.name: User: Empty list → create failed → logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋 User 文件列表空狀態下進入建立文件流程但建立失敗，返回空列表後登出。

paths.name: User: detail load failed→retry→readonly→logout
paths.semanticGoal: 覆蓋 User 文件詳情載入失敗與重試，重試後進入只讀狀態並從只讀詳情登出。
